message.content:
{
  "summary": "The extraction partially succeeded in capturing header information but failed significantly on line items and subtotal accuracy.",
  "failure_reasons": [
    "line_item_omission",
    "incorrect_subtotal",
    "merging_of_modifiers_into_descriptions"
  ],
  "field_notes": {
    "company": "Correct.",
    "date": "Correct (format differs from gold but value is identical).",
    "address": "Correct.",
    "subtotal": "Incorrect. The predicted subtotal is 8.80, whereas the gold subtotal is null. The value 8.80 appears to be a misinterpretation of a line item total.",
    "tax": "Correct.",
    "total": "Correct.",
    "line_items": "Major failure. The model merged modifiers (e.g., 'no pickles', 'CRISPY', 'horchata') into the main item descriptions instead of treating them as separate line items or metadata. It also missed 7 out of 12 gold line items, specifically failing to separate the individual components of the receipt."
  }
}
